# Soft39 Async28 Reserved12 Contract

## Soft 39
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.39 with quality bias floor 0.37 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Async 28
async pre-rot and swarm micro pressure default to 0.28 so reclaim starts earlier

## Reserved 12k
